# Release Checklist

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build:win`
- [ ] Start `LanTransfer.exe` and confirm it prints the console URL and phone URL.
- [ ] Open computer console and verify QR code renders.
- [ ] Scan/open phone URL and verify phone page loads.
- [ ] Check Chinese and English UI.
- [ ] Check light and dark themes.
- [ ] Run `npm run build:site`.
- [ ] Upload `LanTransfer-Windows.zip` to GitHub Releases.
- [ ] Attach release notes from `docs/release.md`.
